name: Beauty’s Target
short_description: This is an immersive romance game where you play as the protagonist, exploring diverse settings and meeting unique characters. By chatting, dating, and exchanging gifts, you can build relationships, unlock engaging storylines, and create your own romantic journey.
detailed_description:
"I'm Targetted by a Beauty!" is a full-motion live-action dating simulation game. In the game, you will meet four beauties with different personalities and backgrounds, and start a dating simulation journey from a first-person perspective, experiencing the whole process of two people in love from meeting to knowing each other to falling in love!

 

Han Yuwei: My childhood sweetheart is staying at my house

Yin Xinglan: Sexy and generous intellectual female pub owner

Li Yuelin: An insecure internet celebrity model

Su Jinyao: My gentle and sweet roommate

After a series of "chasing girls" experiences, you may be able to experience the "sweet and sour" of love and write your own "love history".

Product Features

Fully immersive experience from the first-person perspective:

Shooting from a first-person perspective, all videos will only have the character's voice in addition to the background sound, giving you an immersive love interaction experience.

Unique real-life love development gameplay

Different from other real-life games that explore plot dialogues, our game requires players to continuously increase their favorability with female characters in the game, and enhance the charm of the player's character to unlock more content of the female character;

Different styles of character interaction experience

Among the four female protagonists with different personalities, some are strong and domineering, some are intellectual and generous, some are sensitive and clingy, and some are gentle and sweet, allowing you to experience and explore various different plots;

The heartfelt words of the production team

When you open this game, a wonderful love simulation development journey begins.

Now, this game is finally presented to you. It may not be perfect yet, just like a newborn baby, it needs to continue to grow with everyone's care and feedback. But we believe that it has unlimited potential. We hope that players can find their own happiness in the game, whether fighting side by side with friends or exploring the mysterious world alone.

On the long road of love, there are sweet expectations, bitter entanglements, and all kinds of complex and subtle emotional experiences, which allow us to gain many profound insights. In this process, we may encounter setbacks and difficulties, but as long as we remain sincere and patient and manage it with our heart, I believe that you will definitely be able to gain your own happiness.

In the future, we will continue to work hard to continuously optimize the game based on everyone's feedback and launch more exciting content. We look forward to witnessing the growth of this game with the players and creating more beautiful memories together. Thank you to every player who chooses this game. Your support is our greatest motivation to move forward.

supported_languages:
Simplified Chinese*, Traditional Chinese*, English, French, Italian, German, Russian, Indonesian, Turkish, Japanese, Thai, Vietnamese, Korean
*languages with full audio support
